summary: Tested proficiency-aware teaching system across all 4 agents (Tutor, Planner, Testing, Revision). Backend: 40/41 tests passed (1 skip - no /api/health endpoint). Frontend: Landing, auth, and chat pages load correctly. All proficiency-specific prompts correctly built for beginner/intermediate/advanced levels.

minor.issue: Health check endpoint returns 404 - NOT part of proficiency changes, just missing endpoint

frontend_tests.landing_page: PASSED - Loads with mumble branding, Get Started button, 50+ Languages badge
frontend_tests.auth_page: PASSED - Login form with email/password fields and Log In button
frontend_tests.chat_page: PASSED - Shows user greeting, language selectors, Start a Free Conversation, scenario buttons

features_verified: build_proficiency_block() returns empty string for None/empty level
build_proficiency_block() returns 80% native / 20% target for BEGINNER (different languages)
build_proficiency_block() returns 50% native / 50% target for INTERMEDIATE (different languages)
build_proficiency_block() returns 90%+ target for ADVANCED (different languages)
build_proficiency_block() omits language mix ratio for same-language sessions
Beginner block includes: Word Introductions, Pronunciation, Scaffolding, Grammar, Encouragement sections
Intermediate block includes: open-ended prompts instruction
Advanced block includes: peer treatment instruction
LanguageTutorAgent.system_prompt includes proficiency block when level is set
LanguageTutorAgent.system_prompt excludes proficiency block when level is None
POST /api/conversations creates conversation with proficiency_level=None initially

beginner.word_introductions: Every word needs meaning + phonetic breakdown
beginner.grammar: Explicit explanations, one rule at a time

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: build_proficiency_block() handles same_language flag correctly - no mix ratios for same-language sessions
VERIFIED: All 4 agents (Tutor, Planner, Testing, Revision) include proficiency-specific guides
VERIFIED: Tutor uses build_proficiency_block(proficiency_level, native_name, target_name, same_language)
VERIFIED: Planner includes proficiency_curriculum_guide for beginner/intermediate/advanced
VERIFIED: Testing agent includes proficiency_test_guide for beginner/intermediate/advanced
VERIFIED: Revision agent includes proficiency_revision_guide for beginner/intermediate/advanced
VERIFIED: agent_factory.py passes proficiency_level to all agent constructors
VERIFIED: proficiency_level starts as None and is set via set_proficiency_level tool
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proficiency-aware teaching system fully tested. build_proficiency_block() is the key function that generates level-specific instructions for tutor. Planner/Testing/Revision agents build their guides inline in _build_system_prompt(). Error correction/tolerance is NOT part of this - it's user-decided and handled separately. The proficiency_level is stored per-conversation in MongoDB, starts as None, and gets set when tutor calls set_proficiency_level tool.
